publishedAbstract: * During the lifecycle of Openshift Container Storage, it might occur that a device goes out of space. From the output of the command `heketi-cli topology info`: Id:2d06fb62028448e29e940a49109114f1 Name:/dev/sde State:online Size (GiB):127 Used (GiB):127 Free (GiB):0 * Which is the correct way to extend the capacity of this device?
publishedTitle: How to Increase the Size of a Device Managed by Heketi?
